reviews.review_msg: She is a good and caring professor. Attend the lectures, do the hw questions. Her slides are good to study for the exams. No surprises in the exams.

Arsineh cares about her students and is very easy on grades. However, this may not be helpful when grading on a curve. To succeed in her class, you need to do practice problems and understand all course materials. The only downside about her class is that I don't find her lecture very engaging, but maybe it has to do with accounting itself.
Do the practice questions she assigns in class then you will do well on her exams

Arsineh did a really good job of teaching the course online for the first time. I studied what she recommended maybe only a week before the midterm/final and ended up doing fine by making detailed excel templates and notes for each chapter. Do the assigned hw, study what she tells you, and rewatch her lectures for clarification, and you'll be fine!

She cares about her students & I enjoyed her class. There are a lot to read and practice. However, if you manage your time wisely, plan out your study each week, you'll do well. I took this course while working FT job and was able to get a good grade. I had no background in accounting & her class was one of the most valuable classes I've ever had.

All genuine. Arsineh is not the best at teaching online, but this is a difficult time for both students and profs. However, this is how I succeeded in this course: REIVEW ALL NOTES, REVIEW TEXTBOOK SECTIONS SHE MENTIONS ONLY, AND DO ALL ASSIGNED PROBLEMS. I did not pre read nor did I do extra practice problems. Open book + recorded lectures also?!

Great Professor, understanding professional and extremely nice. Very accessible for conversations outside of class hours, but she will not just give you the answers to your questions. She will guide you, but not spoon feed.

She is a very kind professor. I think midterm is much harder than final exam, final exam do not need to do the excel. I got a low mark on midterm below average, but final exam do better, get b+. Reading textbook is very useful before lecture, but there are too many materials in textbook.

I took BUSI510 with Arsineh and I really enjoyed the course. It was tough material and she made it very easy to understand. She is willing to help you by walking through complex questions. She goes at a good pace but you should also expect to put work in the class. Excellent professor with a good understanding of material and very friendly.

This is a great course, you don't become a CFO, but you understand accounting and finances, I'm not sure about the bad reviews, most likely people who did not want to do the work , She's awesome and will attend her classes again.
prof is understanding and wants students to do well, course is difficult by nature but she tries her best to help you excel

When I first enrolled in this course, I was very worried about it being online. Needless to say, because Arsineh cares a lot about her students doing well, she made it a smooth and easy transition to online learning. She gives BOTH midterm and final review tips so study those concepts and you will do well. Recommend taking it with her online.

She's very nice. She cares so much about her students and wants everyone to do well in the class. She would give us tips how to study for the exam and pinpoint important material to be learned. The course itself is hard, so you need extra effort to truly understand the material. However, she is accessible outside class if you have any questions.

This prof doesnt teach well. You have to learn everything from textbook and chapter problems yourself. No guideline given on how to solve her questions. The multiple choices on midterm are non sense. Midterm 35% final 55% quizzes 10% . Avoid her if you can. Her slides really just duplicated from the publisher slides. Nothing insightful taught.

I am taking 420 online with her. Gosh I do not know how she gets such a good rating here. She does NOT teach anything! Not even a little bit! You really have to teach yourself everything with textbook. And do not trust her words on what would be on exams as she gives questions she said "won't be on exam". She is nice but does not teach well.

Honestly, good luck if ur in her class, and the class is online. U can ask her a question and she will straight up ignore you or tell you how others in the class get the information and you don't. Ive never met a prof who is so rude and unhelpful.

I'm taking BUS420 with her online right now and it's so chaotic. Be prepared to teach yourself the material with ZERO help from her. I asked her for help on an assignment and she literally said "no". I have no idea why her rating is so high.

Arsineh is a nice, east-going, funny prof. She's probably one of the most understanding and helpful profs in terms of asking for additional help. Her exams are clear cut and relevant to the homework examples. Only thing is she goes through examples in class too quickly many times. Overall, I would recommend her

My fav prof for sure! she is so funny and considerate of the students. Her exams are hard but she prepares you for them. She even tells you what concept to study for the biggest mark question so if you don't listen to her tips you will struggle. Very approachable during office hours and just AMAZING over all.

She is such a nice lady! Definitely one of the most caring profs Ive ever had and shes funny! Do the assigned homework questions and youll be fine for exams. Dont slack you will suffer in the class. Literally read the textbook before lecture and try the questions ASAP and youll be golden

Awesome prof! She lets you know exactly whats going to be on the midterm and final. She really wants each and every one of her students to understand and enjoy the course. There are weekly quizzes done in tutorials but that's what helps/keeps you on top of the course!

This class is hard but having a nice and caring prof makes it so much easier. You have to accept the fact that this is tough course but this professor makes it bearable. She genuinely cares about helping students. She understands the struggles the students have. Easily the most caring prof at SFU.

Arsineh is one of the sweetest professors at SFU! She really cares about her students. Her slides and notes are useful for exams. Midterm and final are fair and based on what is taught in lecture. The textbook is useful for practice questions and clarification if needed.

Highly recommend you take BUS 420 with her. She is probably one of the easiest professors and she is super friendly as well. As long as you study you are guaranteed to do well. Average grade is usually an A-.

I took both 254 and 420 with her. She is my best accounting prof ever! She understands for student's situation and tries her best to facilitate them. She gave students very detailed guideline to study for exams. No need to read the book, only need it to do practices which are critical to preparing for the tests. Never think 420 can be this easy :)

As a fourth year accounting student, I've come across various professors. Arsineh is definitely in my top 3. She's insanely kind and makes it very clear for what is to be expected on the exams. She really feels for students and their struggles, so she likes to make it a smooth semester for them. Professors like her are very rare.

What a prof!!! Good sense of humor. She is trying to make everything more simple for students to understand and emphasize things that need more focus in the exam. She is very clear about her expectations and how everything is marked.  Chose her class and for a first time I felt like accounting is understandable :)

A good prof, and a great person. Took 254 and 420 with her, and she is like a friend who truly cares about you. She provides good assignment questions and templates, so that questions on exams are not a surprise. Don't come and expect to learn everything in class though, as the course material is very heavy.

I've never wrote a review for my prof here. But this time I feel I have to. She's very friendly and kind to students. You'd know what to expect in exams as long as u go to lectures. BUT she goes through things WAY TOO FAST! U get lost easily&wouldn't understand a single thing if u come to class w/o reading ahead. Tbh, I'm better off reading myself
Extremely fair professor which makes it very clear what is going to be on exams. If you understand the assignments, the exams are easy. Best prof to take this challenging class with.

She is beautiful, very friendly and nice. By attending the lectures, you will know what is expected in the tests. She is very clear about what is important in every lecture. Also, she always asks for students' feedback in order to improve her teaching skills properly. Besides, she gave students Valentine chocolate.  You'll not regret if taking her

She is beautiful, very friendly and nice. By attending the lectures, you will know what is expected in the tests. She is very clear about what is important in every lecture. Also, she always asks for students' feedback in order to improve her teaching skills properly. Besides, she gave students Valentine chocolate :) you'll not regret if taking her

I wish I hadn't chosen her as my prof for BUS 254. She speeds through lectures and you cannot absorb anything therefore it makes going to lectures a waste of timepointless. She does give out examples that are really helpful and will appear on the test. The final was easier than the midterm especially if you do her practice questions many times.

She isn't as easy as the reviews here make her seem. The mid-term was quite long, but the material in it was not super hard. The final was easier and I finished it faster than the mid-term. The lectures are long, but it is because there is just so much material to cover. Study what she points out and you'll do fine.

Fantastic professor! Approachable, understanding, knowledgeable, and hilarious! She understands the struggles students face, makes herself approachable, is knowledgeable in the field of accounting, and her humor makes lectures worth attending. Ms. Garabedian is one of the best professors I have ever had at Simon Fraser University.
Awesome professor. Super nice. Her slides are very clear informative. She will go through most of the questions covered in the exams during the class. Highly recommend.
Truly cares about the students. Teaches very well, is very thorough. Easy to listen to/understand. Material is simple. Plus, she's hot.

Arsineh is adorable, and its obvious she really cares about her class. Only thing I didn't like is I felt I didn't learn a lot from her. She seemed to get out of breath after an hour of lecture. lots of "talking breaks" and ending early. not what im paying for! learned a lot from the textbook, but she will tell you what's on the exam so go to class

amazing prof that really cares about students. Midterm and final are little hard but fair. course average 66% median 70%. Easy presentation and in class assignments(you get full marks if you go to her tutorials.). recommend

Really easy going prof, sometimes skip off stuff on slide, but made every key point clear. In my class there were too many straight A students so she gave no F or D ! & love those Easter eggs and cookies

You should be prepared to work hard. She will make you do many assignments as well as solve problems in class. As well, she walks around the class to check your work. The class is not a walkover! If you attend class and put in the hard work, you will do well on the exams.

Very funny and nice. One of the most caring instructors I've had! Gives enough in-class practice to ensure you know how to solve the problems. Exams are pretty easy as well because she tells you what to study for.

easy course. most of the content are based on calculation. Her midterm was a bit tough but final was easy. Key to success in her class is to attend all the classes and listen carefully what questions are going to be on the exams. Yes, she will tell you.
THE BEST PROF EVER!!!!!!!!!!!! she really cares about her student, and tell you exactly what she expected on the exam!!! THE BEST PROF EVER!!!!!!!
BEST. PROF. EVER. the class itself can be difficult if you dont keep up with work but she makes it so much better, she knows how to teach and she is hilarious and CUTE :)
Don't take Bus 420 with her. Unable to make concepts understandable...

Entertaining and helpful prof. She's adorable during lecture. Tutorial is utterly useless b/c all u do is sit there and listen to students who can't speak english try to present solutions to problems. Unfortunately it's mandatory. Exams are fair, she'll let you know what to expect.The course itself is hard so study study study!

Very good at her job. She is not the type of prof that only knows her stuff, she can actually teach it too. Great teaching method, makes her classes fun so your mind does not wonder off.course is difficult though
A prof who actually cares about her students. The material itself can be hard but she tells you exactly what to expect on the exams.
Really helpful and nice. The material is difficult, but she goes out of her way to make sure everyone understands.
Extremely helpful and caring prof, will go out of her way to accommodate. The material is not hard, textbook and lectures used extensively.

Nice teacher. She makes it pretty clear what will be on  the exams and what isn't very important. She's not very strict with keeping people quiet, which sucks a bit, but if you don't sit in the back you should be fine.

She is very nice! try to get a spot on her tutorial. It is not hard to pass the course,but not easy to get a good grade either (b+ and up). Don't miss lectures as she will say what will appear on the exam. Loved the course and the prof!
Sadly, the 2nd person below, did not study.
Final was really hard!!! But thankfully, she really cares about her students that gave us relateivly high grades compared to other profs

During review session, she stated that students will be tired for the 7-10pm final exam. Therefore, she promised to make it more bearable. Sadly, she didn't live up to the bargain.  I  had nightmares when I slept after the exam.

Easy-going Prof. She gives away candies to keep students motivated. She actually gives hints on what is on the exam in class. Mid-term is easy. Class average is like 70%. Final is considerably difficult. But her class is scaled and her average is a B- but not C+. This course itself is hard, but getting a decent grade in her class is not that hard:)

A quality prof that cares about the subject and her students. It IS a hard subject, but she makes it bearable. Yes, the final is ridiculous but it's a curved class so does it really matter? If you keep up with readings and do the homework each week, it's actually not bad at all. Go to her office hours if you need help and you should be fine.

the Final is the hardest one i've ever met so far in sfu.the textbook is not good at all, u don't have any extra practice for this stupid sfu-published textbook (251 is a really good one), so most of the them would be painful when   they take the final exam. Most of the questions you must really familiar with, however,  you just don;t know how to d

I like her as a person. She is really approachable and friendly. Midterm is O.K. but the final is a heart-breaker. I saw many students came out of the classroom with a stern face. Overall, it's a nice prof but you better study hard.

prof is extremely helpful and very approachable. the course itself is pact with LOTS of info. midterm was bearable, but final....wow ppl got raped 23/90 students failed 25%...that's a huge amount. the final was BRUTAL...though=( overall the prof is great, and i do not think another teacher can do a better job than she does! recommend!!!!!!!!
GREAT BUS PROF I've ever met!!!Love her :) very helpful, strongly recommand

SUPER nice prof, the BEST prof I have ever had in SFU.. she really care about her students n try to help them as much as she can, though it's a hard course dry material but she is the best for BUS254  coz she make it lill   bearable.. she try to give high grade but cant coz of the bus scale.. sheeven get DRUNK 3 days if she give a student F grade !

Great lecturer, tries to make the boring material as interesting as it could be. She hands out free candy!! Reading the textbook and keeping up with the class is 100% essential. Midterm was very difficult. Final is moderate if you prepare. Overall a wonderful, helpful and extremely nice prof.

Not the BEST prof, but a good prof still, for bus 254.  Due to the fact that 254's course material is hard to start with, this course is not easy at all.  But her exams are VERY FAIR, just do all the exercises for every chapter, and understand the steps and procedures, and you will get a good mark.  Attendance is NOT MANDATORY.  Don't procrastinate

She is the nicest professor I have ever had! I went into her office for a quick question and she spent 20 minutes going over other course material with me. She is extremely approachable, very helpful and super nice!!!!!!

AMAZING prof! So much personality makes this boring class bearable. Her exams are hard cuz she has to scale but she gives maximum amount of high grades out as possible. SO helpful, very clear, very approachable, very funny!! One of the best I've had in 2.5 years at SFU
Nice prof. who gives out candy. She tried, just that the course material is too dry and hard. REALLY hard exams.
such a nice prof. explains things extremely well and really cares about her students. def recommend =)
Wonderful lecturer. Very considerate. Always cares about the thoughts of students.
She is nice but the exams are hard. Plus, there's intense competition for grades as it's scaled. For example, only 2% of the class gets an A+.
Very hard prof, super low averages for the class exams. Do not trust if she say easy exam they are both tough.
GOOD PROF GIVES U CANDY COURSE MOFO HARD THO
had easy examples in lecture notes of questions but midterm she asks much harder questions.

I took her class and she was very intelligent. I read other reviews and she never told us what was on the mid terms or the finals but I think what people are trying to say that she teaches and helps on those points. Very helpful and she managed to keep me awake! Amazing teacher, no doubt.
Very very helpful, tells what is exactly on the midterm and final and is VERY fair!!!!! Love her!!!!!

This prof is super nice! This is the first time she teaches at SFU. I hope she will be here to teach in the future. She tells you exactly she she expects for MT and final and formats of the questions look alike to our practice questions!
She is amazing!! so nice, helpful and kinda funny. she always makes time for questions and tells you exactly what she expects you to know for midterm/final. shes the best!!
shes so nice! very very helpful. encourages questions and extremely helpful. thats all i can say.
